description: sprintf/strcpy/strcat fed by locally-constructed strings — no taint source involved.

expected.notes: sprintf(buf, ...) is a dangerous function even with local strings — AST pattern match is correct.
strcpy(buf, "reset value") is a dangerous function even with constant args — AST pattern match is correct.
strcat(buf, " done") is a dangerous function even with constant args — AST pattern match is correct.
